codeReview.summary: The feature adds hash-based gap-repair enqueueing, but the implementation misses key missed-event cases and does not provide full incremental coverage across larger corpora. As written, it can leave stale index artifacts unrepaired, so expected VAL-INDEX-003 behavior is not fully satisfied.

issues.description: Gap repair only inspects the first 1000 conversation documents per sweep (`fetchSearchDocuments(limit: 1000, sourceKinds: [.conversation])`) with no pagination cursor, so stale records outside that fixed head may never be reconciled. This breaks incremental full-coverage repair when corpus size exceeds 1000.

When a search document's source conversation no longer exists, gap repair `continue`s instead of purging/requeueing purge. Missed delete events therefore leave stale search_documents/search_chunks indefinitely, unlike normal projection job processing which purges missing conversations (`processSourceJob` at lines 487-489).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The indexing-efficiency skill mandates per-invariant red/green tests and retrieval eval runs for projection changes, but this feature handoff reports no added tests and no retrieval-eval command, indicating the procedure lacks explicit fallback guidance for flaky deterministic coverage scenarios.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/indexing-efficiency-worker/SKILL.md:22-35 requires TDD-first + retrieval eval on projection changes; handoff 2026-04-09T03-40-01-164Z...json:12 notes a flaky deferred gap-repair test, and :33-35 shows "added": [] with only xcodebuild scoped tests + swift test in commandsRun.

sharedStateObservations.observation: This feature handoff omits the `skillFeedback` object used in other mission handoffs, which makes procedural-compliance auditing inconsistent for reviewers.

summary: Reviewed feature metadata, worker transcript skeleton, handoff, skill guidance, and commit 6b14104 diff. Found two blocking implementation issues in gap-repair coverage (fixed-size non-paginated scan and missing purge path for deleted sources), so the feature review is marked fail.
